title: Trump admin makes sweeping request for medical records of federal workers
summary: The Trump administration has proposed unprecedented access to federal workers' medical records, including doctors' notes, raising significant privacy and governance concerns.
content: The unprecedented proposal would give the Trump admin access to doctors' notes.

zh.title: 特朗普政府对联邦工作人员医疗记录提出广泛要求
zh.summary: 特朗普政府提议对联邦工作人员的医疗记录进行前所未有的访问，包括医生笔记，引发了重大的隐私和治理担忧。

title: WireGuard VPN developer can’t ship software updates after Microsoft locks account
summary: Microsoft has locked the WireGuard VPN developer's account without notification, blocking software updates; this marks the second high-profile developer facing account restrictions from Microsoft.
content: The popular open source VPN maker is the second high-profile developer to say Microsoft locked his account without notifying him and is blocking their ability to send software updates to users.

zh.title: WireGuard VPN开发者在微软锁定账户后无法发布软件更新
zh.summary: 微软在没有通知的情况下锁定了WireGuard VPN开发者的账户，阻止了软件更新；这是第二位受到微软账户限制的知名开发者。

title: A self-driving car in Texas hit and killed a mother duck, sparking neighborhood outrage
summary: An Avride autonomous vehicle near Austin struck and killed a mother duck without slowing down, sparking community outrage over the incident.
content: An Avride autonomous vehicle near Austin hit the duck, facing backlash from the community. "It didn't slow down or hesitate at all, just steamrolled right through," according to a witness.

zh.title: 德克萨斯州的自动驾驶汽车撞死母鸭，引发邻里愤怒
zh.summary: 奥斯汀附近的Avride自动驾驶汽车在没有减速的情况下撞死了一只母鸭，引发社区对此事件的愤怒。

title: LinkedIn scanning users' browser extensions sparks controversy and two lawsuits
summary: LinkedIn faces two lawsuits over scanning users' browser extensions; the company disputes allegations, claiming they were fabricated by an extension maker suspended for data scraping.
content: LinkedIn says claims fabricated by extension maker suspended for scraping data.

zh.title: LinkedIn扫描用户浏览器扩展引发争议和两起诉讼
zh.summary: LinkedIn因扫描用户浏览器扩展而面临两起诉讼；该公司对指控提出异议，声称这些指控是由因数据抓取被暂停的扩展制造商伪造的。

title: AI agent Poke makes setting up automations as easy as sending a text
summary: Poke is an AI agent that enables task automation through text messaging, making complex automations accessible to everyday users without technical setup or specialized apps.
content: Poke brings AI agents to everyday users via text message by handling tasks and automations without complex setup, apps, or technical know-how.

zh.title: AI 代理 Poke 让自动化设置就像发送文本一样简单
zh.summary: Poke 是一个 AI 代理，可通过文本消息实现任务自动化，使复杂的自动化对普通用户来说无需技术设置或专门应用程序即可访问。

title: Canva doubles down on AI and marketing automation with Simtheory, Ortto acquisitions
summary: Canva has acquired Simtheory and Ortto to strengthen its agentic AI, data infrastructure, marketing automation, and customer engagement capabilities.
content: Canva says the acquisitions add strengths in agentic AI, data infrastructure, marketing automation, and customer engagement.

zh.title: Canva 通过收购 Simtheory 和 Ortto 加强 AI 和营销自动化
zh.summary: Canva 收购了 Simtheory 和 Ortto，以加强其智能 AI、数据基础设施、营销自动化和客户参与能力。

title: Iran-linked hackers disrupt operations at US critical infrastructure sites
summary: Iran-linked hackers have disrupted operations at U.S. critical infrastructure sites as tensions escalate in the U.S.-Israel conflict.
content: As the US and Israel's war has ramped up, so too have hacks on US industrial sites.

title: OpenAI made economic proposals — here’s what DC thinks of them
summary: OpenAI has submitted economic proposals to Washington D.C. policymakers amid ongoing uncertainty about tech industry regulation and government policy.
content:
Happy ceasefire day and welcome to Regulator, a newsletter for Verge subscribers about Big Tech's rocky journey through the world of politics. If you're not a subscriber yet, you can do so here, but my only request is that you sign up before Donald Trump decides to revisit his previous threats toward Iran and kickstart World War III.
I'm back after being waylaid last week by the deadly combo of a moderate cold and the beginning of pollen season. (Twenty-one percent of the District's acreage is taken up by public green space, and DC is consistently ranked the best city park system in America. Unfortunately, I am allergic to every tree and gr …
Read the full story at The Verge.

title: AWS boss explains why investing billions in both Anthropic and OpenAI is an OK conflict
summary: AWS CEO explains that investing billions in both Anthropic and OpenAI isn't a conflict because AWS maintains a competitive culture even while partnering with rivals.
content: AWS has an ingrained culture of handling competition, he explained, because the cloud giant also competes with its partners.

zh.title: AWS首席执行官解释向Anthropic和OpenAI投资数十亿美元为何不构成利益冲突

title: Meta's Superintelligence Lab unveils its first public model, Muse Spark
summary: Meta's Superintelligence Lab has unveiled Muse Spark, its first public AI model, though the company acknowledges performance gaps in agentic and coding systems.
content: Meta touts strong benchmarks but admits "performance gaps" in agentic and coding systems.

title: Amazon to end support for older Kindle devices
summary: Amazon is ending software support for all Kindle e-readers released in 2012 or earlier, making them unable to load new content.
content: Amazon told Kindle owners this week that it's ending support for all e-readers released in 2012 or earlier, making them virtually unable to load any new content.

zh.title: 亚马逊停止支持旧款Kindle设备
zh.summary: 亚马逊将停止对所有2012年及更早发布的Kindle电子阅读器的软件支持，使其无法加载新内容。

title: I finally get the iPhone Air
summary: The iPhone Air works best as a second phone paired with a more capable primary device, according to a Verge writer's humorous take on the device.
content:
The perfect phone for people who carry two phones. | Photo by Vjeran Pavic / The Verge	

I saw a lot of weird phones at Mobile World Congress last month: robot phones, cameras disguised as phones, phones for dogs. But the one that caught me most off guard was the one my friend (and Verge alum) Sam Byford brought to dinner: an iPhone Air.
"Ha!" I said. "You actually use that thing?" 
"Yeah," he said. "It's great." That's when he pulled out a second phone - the Xiaomi Leica Leitzphone, which he was using alongside it. 
Got it, I said. The trick to enjoying the iPhone Air is to simply have another, much better phone on your person at all times. I found this very funny and recounted the anecdote to anyone who would listen. But fr …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 我终于拿到了iPhone Air
zh.summary: 根据Verge记者的幽默评价，iPhone Air最适合作为与更强大的主设备配对使用的第二部手机。

title: The AI RAM shortage is also driving up SSD prices
summary: SSD prices are surging 3-4x due to AI infrastructure demand diverting semiconductor capacity, with consumer drives now costing significantly more than in 2024.
content:
I thought the WD Black SN850X 2TB SSD in my gaming PC was pricey when I bought it for $173 in 2024, but now that same SSD costs $649, more than what I paid for most of the parts in my PC combined. The price on my WD Black drive nearly quadrupled since November 2025, and consumer SSDs across the board are seeing similar increases, much like with RAM:
The 4TB version of the popular Samsung 990 Pro SSD previously cost $320, but will now run you nearly $1,000.
External SanDisk SSDs saw a 200 percent price hike at the Apple Store in March.
Sony has announced that it's suspending orders for its SD and CFexpress cards. 
Modular PC brand  …

Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: AI内存短缺也在推高SSD价格
zh.summary: 由于AI基础设施需求转移半导体产能，SSD价格飙升3-4倍，消费者驱动器的价格现在明显高于2024年。

title: How our digital devices are putting our right to privacy at risk
summary: Law professor Andrew Guthrie Ferguson discusses how digital devices and data collection practices threaten privacy rights in his new book 'Your Data Will Be Used Against You.'
content: Law professor Andrew Guthrie Ferguson chats with Ars about his new book, Your Data Will Be Used Against You.

zh.title: 我们的数字设备如何威胁我们的隐私权
zh.summary: 法律教授安德鲁·格思里·弗格森在他的新书《你的数据将被用来对付你》中讨论了数字设备和数据收集实践如何威胁隐私权。

title: Meta debuts the Muse Spark model in a ‘ground-up overhaul’ of its AI
summary: Meta released the Muse Spark model under its new Superintelligence Labs division, led by former Scale AI CEO Alexandr Wang, in a significant overhaul of its AI strategy.
content: This is the first model Meta has released under its Superintelligence Labs, led by former Scale AI CEO Alexandr Wang.

zh.title: Meta在其AI的"彻底改革"中推出了Muse Spark模型
zh.summary: Meta在其新的超级智能实验室部门下发布了Muse Spark模型，由前Scale AI首席执行官亚历山大·王领导，这是其AI战略的重大改革。

title: Hack-for-hire group caught targeting Android devices and iCloud backups
summary: Security researchers exposed a hack-for-hire spying campaign using Android spyware and phishing tactics to steal iCloud credentials and compromise victim devices.
content: Security researchers exposed a spying campaign by a hack-for-hire group that used Android spyware and phishing to steal iCloud credentials and hack victims’ devices.

zh.title: 雇佣黑客集团被曝瞄准安卓设备和iCloud备份

title: Motorola suddenly raises budget phone prices up to 50%—you can probably thank AI
summary: Motorola has raised prices on its budget smartphone lineup by up to 50%, a shift likely driven by AI-related manufacturing and development costs.
content: Motorola's budget phones are much less budget-friendly today.

zh.title: 摩托罗拉突然将预算手机价格上调至50%——你可能要感谢AI
zh.summary: 摩托罗拉将其预算智能手机产品线价格上调至50%，这一转变很可能是由AI相关的制造和开发成本所驱动。

title: Tubi is the first streamer to launch a native app within ChatGPT
summary: Tubi becomes the first streaming service to launch an integrated app directly within ChatGPT, allowing millions of users to access content without leaving the AI platform. This integration signals how streaming services are adapting to reach audiences in emerging AI distribution channels. The move reflects the growing importance of AI chatbots as gateways to mainstream services.
content: Tubi becomes the first streaming service to offer an app integration within ChatGPT, the AI chatbot that millions of users turn to for answers.

zh.title: Tubi是首个在ChatGPT中推出原生应用的流媒体平台
zh.summary: Tubi成为首个在ChatGPT中直接推出集成应用的流媒体服务，使数百万用户可以在无需离开AI平台的情况下访问内容。这一整合展示了流媒体服务如何适应并在新兴AI分发渠道中触及受众。这一举措反映了AI聊天机器人作为主流服务网关的日益重要性。

title: The Neo Effect: How Apple’s cheapest Mac is changing the PC game
summary: Apple's $599 MacBook Neo is disrupting the laptop market by offering premium build quality and performance at an unprecedented price point, forcing traditional PC makers to compete on value. Featuring an A18 Pro chip, aluminum construction, and excellent input devices, it combines the MacBook experience with budget pricing. This move signals Apple's entry into the mass-market segment and represents a competitive threat PC makers weren't prepared for.
content:
This thing is poised to eat their lunch. | Photo by Amelia Holowaty Krales / The Verge	

The MacBook Neo is disrupting the laptop space and putting Apple into the conversation as a value option like it’s never been before. With a price starting at $599 (or $499 for students and teachers), the colorful laptop’s A18 Pro chip may be stolen from older iPads and iPhones, but it offers more than enough performance for everyday tasks and web browsing. 
From the screen sharpness, trackpad/keyboard feel,  and its aluminum build, everything else about it is in line with more expensive MacBooks. 
And that means PC makers have a hot new competitor to contend with and adapt to — one that they weren’t ready for. Here’s all the news and analysis of Apple’s Mac for the masses.


					
A MacBook Neo heatsink mod dramatically improves its gaming performance.
			
I’m testing the MacBook Neo’s competition. What do you want to know?

iFixit calls the Neo Apple’s “most repairable MacBook in 14 Years.”
			
The MacBook Neo is a winner
			
PC makers are not ready for the MacBook Neo
			
The MacBook Neo is surprisingly easy to disassemble and repair.
			
Pro videographer finds the MacBook Neo more capable than expected.
			
Here’s where you can buy Apple’s budget-friendly MacBook Neo
			
I reviewed the MacBook Neo, ask me anything
			
MacBook Neo review: the Mac for the masses
			
Preorders for Apple’s colorful MacBook Neo come with a $25 gift card
			
MacBook Neo versus an old MacBook Air: good luck
			
Apple launches $599 MacBook Neo powered by an iPhone chip
			
Our first hands-on look at Apple’s MacBook Neo
			
Apple’s website leaks MacBook ‘Neo,’ which could be its new cheaper laptop
			
Apple helped kill netbooks. Will it bring them back?
			
Bring back the iBook, you cowards
			
Apple is reportedly working on a c

zh.title: 新产品效应：苹果最便宜的Mac如何改变PC市场格局
zh.summary: 苹果推出599美元的MacBook Neo，以前所未有的价格提供高端构建质量和性能，扰乱笔记本电脑市场，迫使传统PC制造商在价值竞争中重新定位。这款产品配备A18 Pro芯片、铝制构造和出色的输入设备，将MacBook体验与预算定价相结合。这一举措标志着苹果进入大众市场，给PC制造商带来了意外的竞争威胁。

title: To beat Altman in court, Musk offers to give all damages to OpenAI nonprofit
summary: Elon Musk offered to donate all damages from his lawsuit against OpenAI to the nonprofit, reversing his earlier demand for up to $134 billion.
content: Musk won’t seek a “single dollar” in OpenAI suit after asking to pocket up to $134 billion.

zh.title: 为在法庭上击败阿尔特曼，马斯克承诺将诉讼赔偿款全部捐献给OpenAI非营利组织
zh.summary: 埃隆·马斯克承诺将他针对OpenAI诉讼中获得的所有赔偿款捐献给该非营利组织，推翻了他之前要求高达1340亿美元赔偿的立场。

title: Iran demands cryptocurrency toll from tankers passing through Strait of Hormuz
summary: Iran is requiring tankers passing through the Strait of Hormuz to reveal their cargo and pay transit tolls in cryptocurrency. This novel approach to regulating one of the world's most critical shipping channels introduces digital currency into state toll mechanisms. The policy could significantly impact global oil trade and set a precedent for cryptocurrency use in international commerce.
content: Any tanker passing must reveal its cargo so Iran can determine transit fee amount.

zh.title: 伊朗要求通过霍尔木兹海峡的油轮支付加密货币通行费
zh.summary: 伊朗要求通过霍尔木兹海峡的油轮披露货物并以加密货币支付过境通行费。这种管理世界最关键航运渠道的创新方式将数字货币引入国家通行费机制。该政策可能对全球石油贸易产生重大影响，并为加密货币在国际商务中的应用树立先例。

title: Volkswagen begins testing its self-driving microbuses in Los Angeles ahead of launch with Uber
summary: Volkswagen's MOIA subsidiary is testing self-driving microbuses in Los Angeles ahead of a planned commercial robotaxi service launch with Uber. The company faces a complex regulatory path before commercial deployment can begin. This partnership represents a traditional automaker's major push into autonomous vehicles and ride-sharing services.
content: Volkswagen subsidiary MOIA America still has a long and winding regulatory road before it can launch a commercial robotaxi service.

zh.title: 大众开始在洛杉矶测试自动驾驶小型巴士，为与Uber合作做准备
zh.summary: 大众旗下的MOIA子公司正在洛杉矶测试自动驾驶小型巴士，为计划中与Uber合作推出的商用无人驾驶出租车服务做准备。该公司在商用部署前面临复杂的监管流程。这一合作伙伴关系代表了传统汽车制造商进军自动驾驶车辆和网约车服务的重大举措。

title: Microsoft’s executive shake-up continues as developer division chief resigns
summary: Julia Liuson, Microsoft's Developer Division chief for 12 years, is resigning after 34 years at the company, with plans to move to an advisory role under AI chief Jay Parikh by June. Her departure reflects Microsoft's strategic pivot toward artificial intelligence and CoreAI as central priorities. The change marks another high-level executive shift during Microsoft's ongoing restructuring around AI capabilities.
content:
Microsoft is losing another veteran executive. Julia Liuson, head of Microsoft's developer division (DevDiv), is resigning from the software giant after 34 years. Liuson spent the past 12 years leading Microsoft's developer business, during a period Microsoft focused more on open source projects and acquired GitHub for $7.5 billion.
Liuson will continue as head of DevDiv until the end of June, and then move to an "advisory role" reporting to Microsoft CoreAI chief Jay Parikh, according to an internal memo seen by The Verge. It's not immediately clear who will replace Liuson, or whether the DevDiv team will simply report up to Parikh in the  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 微软高管变动继续，开发者部门主管离职
zh.summary: 担任微软开发者部门主管12年的朱莉亚·刘松在任职34年后宣布离职，计划在6月前转入AI主管杰伊·帕里克的顾问团队。她的离职反映了微软战略重心向人工智能和CoreAI的转变。这一变动标志着微软围绕AI能力进行的持续重组中的又一次高管调整。

title: These are the countries moving to ban social media for children
summary: Following Australia's late 2025 ban on social media for minors, multiple countries are moving to implement similar restrictions to protect young users from cyberbullying, addiction, and predatory contact. This global trend reflects growing government concern about social media's documented mental health impacts on children. The regulatory shift represents a major change in how democracies are approaching youth online safety.
content: Australia was the first country to issue a ban in late 2025, aiming to reduce the pressures and risks that young users may face on social media, including cyberbullying, social media addiction, and exposure to predators.

zh.title: 这些国家正在禁止儿童使用社交媒体
zh.summary: 继澳大利亚在2025年末禁止未成年人使用社交媒体后，多个国家正在采取措施实施类似限制，以保护青少年免受网络欺凌、成瘾和掠夺性接触。这一全球趋势反映了政府对社交媒体对儿童心理健康的已证实影响的日益关注。这一监管转变代表了民主国家在应对青少年在线安全问题的方式上的重大改变。

title: Meta is reentering the AI race with a new model called Muse Spark
summary: Meta has launched Muse Spark, its first major AI model following Zuckerberg's billion-dollar AI overhaul, now powering Meta's AI app and website with rollout planned across WhatsApp, Instagram, Facebook, Messenger, and Ray-Ban smart glasses. The model is purpose-built to integrate across Meta's ecosystem similar to how Google's Gemini works with Google services. This marks Meta's strategic push to compete in AI while leveraging its massive cross-platform user base.
content:
Meta Superintelligence Labs is launching its first model since Mark Zuckerberg spent billions overhauling the company's AI efforts. Called Muse Spark, the model now powers the Meta AI app and the Meta AI website in the US, per the company's announcement. In the coming weeks, Meta says, it will appear in WhatsApp, Instagram, Facebook, Messenger, and Meta's smart glasses, as well as roll out in other countries.  
Like Google Gemini, which easily integrates into Google's product suite, Meta touts Muse Spark as "purpose-built for Meta's products." The model, the first in a new series, will also be available to some of Meta's partners in private …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Meta以新模型Muse Spark重新进入AI竞争
zh.summary: Meta推出了Muse Spark，这是扎克伯格十亿美元AI改革之后的首个主要AI模型，目前为Meta的AI应用和网站提供支持，计划在WhatsApp、Instagram、Facebook、Messenger和Ray-Ban智能眼镜上推出。该模型专为跨越Meta生态系统集成而设计，类似于谷歌的Gemini与谷歌服务的协作方式。这标志着Meta利用其庞大的跨平台用户基础在AI领域竞争的战略推进。

title: British cryptographer Adam Back denies NYT report that he is Bitcoin creator Satoshi Nakamoto
summary: British cryptographer Adam Back has denied a New York Times report claiming he is Bitcoin's anonymous creator, Satoshi Nakamoto. Back, a respected long-time cryptography researcher, is among the few individuals who have faced such speculation over the years. The denial adds another chapter to the ongoing mystery surrounding Bitcoin's true founder's identity.
content: Back, a long-time researcher and pioneer in cryptography, denies the allegation that he is the secretive creator of Bitcoin.

zh.title: 英国密码学家Adam Back否认纽约时报关于他是比特币创始人中本聪的报道
zh.summary: 英国密码学家Adam Back否认了纽约时报的报道，该报道声称他是比特币的匿名创始人中本聪。Back是一位备受尊敬的长期密码学研究人员，是多年来面临这种猜测的少数几个人之一。这一否认为围绕比特币真正创始人身份的持续谜团增添了新的篇章。

title: Astropad’s Workbench reimagines remote desktop for AI agents, not IT support
summary: Astropad's Workbench provides low-latency remote desktop access for monitoring and controlling AI agents on Mac Minis from iPhones or iPads. The platform is specifically designed for AI agent management rather than traditional IT support use cases. It addresses the growing need for mobile interfaces to oversee autonomous AI systems running on local hardware.
content: Astropad’s Workbench lets users remotely monitor and control AI agents on Mac Minis from iPhone or iPad, with low-latency streaming and mobile access.

zh.title: Astropad的Workbench为AI代理而非IT支持重新设计远程桌面
zh.summary: Astropad的Workbench为从iPhone或iPad监控和控制Mac Minis上的AI代理提供低延迟远程桌面访问。该平台专门为AI代理管理而设计，而不是传统的IT支持用例。它解决了在本地硬件上运行的自主AI系统日益增长的移动监控界面需求。

title: Amazon’s Smart Thermostat can help lower your energy bills, and it’s down to $62
summary: Amazon's Smart Thermostat has dropped to $61.99, its best price of 2026 outside of Black Friday, offering learning capabilities and automatic adjustments typically found in premium models. The device integrates with Alexa voice control, tracks HVAC energy usage, and supports most 24-volt systems for significant energy savings. Now is an ideal time to purchase before summer cooling season begins.
content:
Amazon’s Smart Thermostat is down to its best price of the year. | Image: Amazon	

With temperatures on the rise and Earth Day right around the corner, now’s a good time to invest in a smart thermostat if you haven’t already. A good one like Amazon’s Smart Thermostat can help reduce energy use and lower your bills without sacrificing comfort, and right now it’s just $61.99 ($18 off) at Amazon. Aside from a brief drop during Amazon’s Big Spring Sale, it’s spent most of 2026 at full price, making this the best deal we’ve seen since it dropped to $51.99 on Black Friday.  
Amazon Smart Thermostat

Where to Buy:

 $79.99 $61.99 at Amazon
 $79.99 $63.99 at Best Buy
 $79.99 $63.99 at B&H Photo

My colleague Jennifer Pattison Tuohy was impressed by how much the smart thermostat delivers for the price. It can learn your habits over time so you can set it and forget it, which is a feature typically found in more expensive options, and it can automatically adjust based on whether you’re home, away, or asleep. You can also create schedules, tweak settings remotely from your phone, and track your HVAC energy usage in the app, which makes it easier to spot patterns and cut down on your monthly bill.
The thermostat also integrates with Amazon Alexa, letting you adjust your home’s temperature using voice commands, and works with most 24-volt HVAC systems. Despite its low price, it doesn’t look cheap either, offering a sleek, minimalist design with a simple, intuitive interface that’s easy to use at a glance.
Of course, to keep costs down, there are some features you’ll have to do without. It doesn’t include native temperature sensors, for example, and it doesn’t support voice assistants beyond Alexa. But it still covers the essentials and can help you save on energy costs over time, making it a smart buy for the price.
Read our Amazon Smart Thermostat review.
Three more deals worth a look:
You can pick up the Anker 45W USB-C Fast Charger for $19.99 ($15 off) at Amazon and directly

zh.title: 亚马逊智能恒温器可以降低您的能源账单，价格跌至62美元
zh.summary: 亚马逊智能恒温器跌至61.99美元，是2026年黑色星期五外的最低价格，提供了通常在高端型号中才能找到的学习能力和自动调节功能。该设备与Alexa语音控制集成，跟踪HVAC能源使用情况，并支持大多数24伏系统以实现显著的能源节省。现在是在夏季冷却季节开始之前购买的理想时机。

title: Hackers steal and leak sensitive LAPD police documents
summary: The World Leaks extortion gang has stolen and leaked sensitive Los Angeles Police Department documents from a digital storage system belonging to the city's Attorney's Office. The breach exposes confidential law enforcement information and demonstrates the vulnerability of municipal security systems to sophisticated cyber attacks. This incident highlights the ongoing threat posed by ransomware and extortion gangs to government agencies.
content: The LAPD said the breach affected “a digital storage system” belonging to the city’s Attorney's Office. The World Leaks extortion gang was reported to be behind the attack.

zh.title: 黑客盗取和泄露洛杉矶警局敏感警察文件
zh.summary: World Leaks勒索团伙从属于该市律师办公室的数字存储系统中盗取并泄露了洛杉矶警局的敏感文件。这次违规暴露了机密执法信息，并表明了市政安全系统对复杂网络攻击的脆弱性。这一事件强调了勒索软件和勒索团伙对政府机构构成的持续威胁。

title: Steam client files point to "framerate estimator" feature in the works
summary: Analysis of Steam client files reveals Valve is developing a "framerate estimator" feature that shows users predicted gaming performance based on actual framerates reported by other Steam players. This community-driven performance prediction tool could help gamers make informed purchasing decisions using real-world data. The feature represents Valve's effort to improve game discovery transparency and player decision-making on the platform.
content: JSON text strings suggest performance charts based on "framerates of other Steam users."

zh.title: Steam客户端文件指向正在开发的"帧率估计器"功能
zh.summary: 对Steam客户端文件的分析显示，Valve正在开发一个"帧率估计器"功能，该功能根据其他Steam玩家报告的实际帧率向用户显示预测的游戏性能。这个社区驱动的性能预测工具可以帮助游戏玩家使用真实世界的数据做出明智的购买决定。该功能代表了Valve改进游戏发现透明度和玩家平台决策的努力。

title: For the first time ever, Amazon is cutting old Kindles off from the Kindle Store
summary: Amazon is restricting access to the Kindle Store for older Kindle devices, marking the first time the company has cut off store access to legacy hardware, though post-2013 models will continue functioning without updates. The move impacts users of pre-2013 Kindles while reflecting Amazon's shift away from supporting older device generations. It signals Amazon's strategy to deprecate outdated hardware and encourage upgrades.
content: Post-2013 Kindles will continue to work, even if they no longer receive updates.

zh.title: 亚马逊首次停止向旧版Kindle设备提供Kindle商店访问
zh.summary: 亚马逊限制了旧款Kindle设备对Kindle商店的访问权限,这是该公司首次切断了对遗留硬件的商店访问,但2013年后的机型将继续在不进行更新的情况下运行。此举影响了2013年前Kindle用户,同时反映了亚马逊停止支持较旧设备代的转变。它表明了亚马逊弃用过时硬件并鼓励用户升级的策略。

title: OpenAI releases a new safety blueprint to address the rise in child sexual exploitation
summary: OpenAI has released a Child Safety Blueprint to combat the increasing use of AI in generating child sexual exploitation material and online grooming. The safety initiative addresses growing concerns about how AI advancement has created new opportunities for child abuse. This proactive stance reflects the tech industry's broader challenge of preventing malicious use of powerful AI systems.
content: OpenAI's new Child Safety Blueprint aims to tackle the alarming rise in child sexual exploitation linked to advancements in AI.

zh.title: OpenAI发布新的安全蓝图以应对儿童性虐待的上升
zh.summary: OpenAI发布了儿童安全蓝图,以应对人工智能在生成儿童性虐待材料和在线诱骗中不断增加的使用。该安全计划解决了关于人工智能进步如何为儿童虐待创造新机会的日益增长的担忧。这种主动立场反映了科技行业更广泛的挑战,即防止对强大人工智能系统的恶意使用。

title: Developer of VeraCrypt encryption software says Windows users may face boot-up issues after Microsoft locked his account
summary: The developer of VeraCrypt, a popular open-source file encryption tool, reports that Microsoft's account lock could prevent Windows users from booting their computers. The account lockout raises concerns about access to critical security software and Microsoft's enforcement practices against independent developers. This incident highlights tensions between platform control and the maintenance of community-driven open source security tools.
content: The maker of the popular open source file encryption software VeraCrypt said Microsoft locked his online account, which may prevent device owners from booting up their computers.

zh.title: VeraCrypt加密软件开发者称微软锁定账户后Windows用户可能面临启动问题
zh.summary: 流行的开源文件加密工具VeraCrypt的开发者报告称,微软的账户锁定可能会阻止Windows用户启动他们的计算机。账户被锁定引发了对关键安全软件访问权限和微软对独立开发者执法做法的担忧。这一事件强调了平台控制和社区驱动的开源安全工具维护之间的紧张关系。

title: No big trucks for little roads: American OEMs say EU is blocking imports
summary: U.S. automakers claim the EU is restricting imports of full-size trucks due to limited European demand for large vehicles, creating a trade tension.
content: European buyers aren't interested in full-size trucks; US car industry doesn't care.

zh.title: 小路容不下大卡车：美国车企称欧盟阻止进口
zh.summary: 美国汽车制造商声称欧盟因欧洲对大型车辆需求有限而限制全尺寸卡车进口，引发贸易紧张。

title: Databricks co-founder wins prestigious ACM award, says ‘AGI is here already’
summary: Databricks co-founder Matei Zaharia received the Association for Computing Machinery's top honor while arguing that artificial general intelligence already exists today.
content: Matei Zaharia has won the top honor from the Association for Computing Machinery. Now he's working on AI for research and says AGI is simply misunderstood.

zh.title: Databricks联合创始人赢得享誉盛名的ACM奖，称"通用人工智能已经来临"
zh.summary: Databricks联合创始人Matei Zaharia获得了计算机协会的最高荣誉，同时主张人工通用智能已经存在。

title: The Miniature Wife was an exercise in visual trickery
summary: Peacock's adaptation of 'The Miniature Wife' explores marital dynamics through a woman shrunk to coffee-mug size, starring Elizabeth Banks and Matthew Macfadyen.
content:
In Manuel Gonzales' 2013 short story "The Miniature Wife," a woman starts to become a different kind of person after her husband accidentally shrinks her down to the size of a coffee mug. Because of her new stature, the woman is more physically vulnerable, and it's difficult for her to effectively communicate with normal sized people. But for all the danger that the woman's tininess puts her in, it also pushes her to tap into a strength that takes her husband by surprise.
The marital dynamics are very similar in Peacock's new The Miniature Wife series adaptation starring Elizabeth Banks and Matthew Macfadyen. The show adds depth to both of  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 《微型妻子》是视觉欺骗的展现
zh.summary: Peacock对《微型妻子》的改编通过一位被缩小到咖啡杯大小的女性来探索婚姻关系，由伊丽莎白·班克斯和马修·麦克法迪恩主演。

title: With Orion still flying, NASA is nearing key decisions about Artemis III
summary: NASA is finalizing critical decisions for the Artemis III mission, including the spacecraft's initial orbital parameters as the Orion vehicle completes its current flight.
content: "One of the questions is what the initial orbit will be for Artemis III."

zh.summary: NASA正在为月神三号任务敲定关键决定，包括当猎户座航天器完成当前飞行时的初始轨道参数。

title: As YouTube grows on TV, it eyes more interactive video across formats
summary: YouTube is expanding its TV strategy through hiring, partnerships, and a new Bengaluru hub to develop more interactive video experiences across diverse formats.
content: YouTube's hiring across roles, partnerships, and a Bengaluru hub shows how it is building out its TV strategy.

zh.title: 随着YouTube在电视上的发展，它在各种格式中寻求更多互动视频
zh.summary: YouTube通过招聘、合作伙伴关系和新的班加罗尔中心来扩展其电视战略，以在各种格式中开发更多互动视频体验。

title: Final 3 days to save up to $500 on your TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 pass
summary: TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 conference passes are available at up to $500 discount through April 10, 11:59 p.m. PT.
content: Save up to $500 on your TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 pass until April 10, 11:59 p.m. PT. Secure your spot at the center of the tech ecosystem. Register today.

zh.summary: TechCrunch Disrupt 2026会议通行证在太平洋时间4月10日晚上11:59之前可获得最多$500折扣。

title: Anthropic limits access to Mythos, its new cybersecurity AI model
summary: Anthropic is restricting access to Claude Mythos Preview, its new cybersecurity-focused AI model, to a select group of testing partners.
content: A select group of customers is testing the Claude Mythos Preview.

zh.title: Anthropic限制对其新网络安全AI模型Mythos的访问权限
zh.summary: Anthropic正在限制对Claude Mythos Preview的访问权限，这是其专注于网络安全的新AI模型，仅限于精选的测试合作伙伴使用。

title: Atlassian launches visual AI tools and third-party agents in Confluence
summary: Atlassian added visual AI tools and third-party agent integrations from Lovable, Replit, and Gamma to Confluence, expanding its collaborative capabilities.
content: Confluence users can now create visual assets within the software in addition to new third-party agents working with Lovable, Replit, and Gamma.

zh.title: Atlassian在Confluence中推出可视化AI工具和第三方代理
zh.summary: Atlassian在Confluence中添加了来自Lovable、Replit和Gamma的可视化AI工具和第三方代理集成，扩展了其协作功能。

title: X is rolling out automatic translation and photo editing powered by Grok
summary: X is introducing automatic translation and photo editing features powered by its Grok AI model, enhancing the platform's capabilities for global users and content creators.
content: New automatic translations and photo editing on X are powered by the company's flagship AI model.

zh.title: X推出由Grok驱动的自动翻译和照片编辑功能
zh.summary: X正在推出由其Grok AI模型驱动的自动翻译和照片编辑功能，增强了平台对全球用户和内容创作者的功能。

title: Insta360’s Snap is a tiny magnetic phone screen for taking rear-camera selfies
summary: Insta360 unveiled the Snap, a magnetic accessory that attaches to smartphone backs to enable rear-camera selfies with real-time preview. The device works with both iOS and Android, offering improved selfie quality though with some usability trade-offs.
content:
The Snap lets you frame selfies using your phone’s best cameras.	

Insta360 just announced the Snap, a new smartphone accessory designed to improve the quality of your selfies. It works like a digital mirror magnetically attached to the back of your Android or iOS smartphone so you can preview and properly frame shots using its more capable rear cameras, while touchscreen functionality lets you control camera apps without having to constantly flip your phone around. After testing the Snap with my iPhone 16 Pro for a week I found it to be an effective way to use my phone's multiple rear cameras for selfies, but the accessory is not without some frustrating quirks.
The Insta360 Snap Selfie Screen is availabl …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Insta360的Snap是一个用于后置摄像头自拍的小型磁性手机屏幕
zh.summary: Insta360推出了Snap，这是一个磁性配件，可以附加到智能手机背面，实现具有实时预览的后置摄像头自拍。该设备与iOS和Android兼容，提供改进的自拍质量，但存在一些可用性权衡。

title: Unionized ProPublica staff are on strike over AI, layoffs, and wages
summary: ProPublica Guild members representing roughly 150 employees are striking for 24 hours over stalled labor negotiations centered on AI protections, job security, and compensation. The union has been negotiating since 2023 with key issues including layoff protections still unresolved.
content:
Unionized staff at ProPublica, one of the country's leading nonprofit newsrooms, are walking off the job for 24 hours beginning Wednesday and asking the public to honor a digital picket line.
The roughly 150 members of the ProPublica Guild are in the midst of negotiating a collective bargaining agreement after unionizing in 2023. The union says key issues are still in contention, including protections around the use of AI, "just cause" provisions around disciplining or firing an employee, layoff protections, and wages.
"We've been working to resolve this quietly for over two years," says Katie Campbell, a ProPublica Guild member. "This is  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: ProPublica工会工作人员因AI、裁员和工资问题罢工
zh.summary: 代表约150名员工的ProPublica工会成员因停滞的劳动谈判罢工24小时，重点是AI保护、工作保障和薪酬。工会自2023年以来一直在谈判，关键问题包括裁员保护仍未解决。

title: How nuclear batteries could speed the race to fusion power
summary: Avalanche Energy is developing a novel class of materials through a DARPA project that converts radiation into electricity, potentially accelerating fusion power research. Nuclear batteries could provide crucial power generation capabilities for advanced fusion experiments.
content: Avalanche Energy is working on an DARPA project to build a new class of materials capable of turning damaging radiation into electricity.

zh.title: 核电池如何加速核融合竞速
zh.summary: Avalanche Energy 正在通过DARPA项目开发一类新型材料，可将辐射转换为电力，可能加速核融合电力研究。核电池可为先进核融合实验提供关键的电力生成能力。

title: GoPro is cutting 23 percent of its workforce
summary: GoPro announced plans to cut 145 employees—23 percent of its 631-person workforce—as the action camera company struggles with competition and declining revenue. The layoffs will occur during Q2 2026 and could cost the company up to $15 million in severance and benefits.
content:
The GoPro Max2 is the company’s most recent action camera, launched in September 2025. | Image: GoPro	

GoPro has announced plans to cut nearly a quarter of its workforce in an effort to return to profitability, after struggling with increased competition and declining revenue.
The cuts, announced in a Form 8-K filing, are expected to amount to 145 jobs, roughly 23 percent of GoPro's 631 employees, and could cost GoPro as much as $15 million in severance payments and healthcare benefits. The company says the cuts will be implemented during the second quarter of 2026, and most of the layoffs will be completed by the end of the year. The company previously laid off workers in two separate rounds in 2024.
GoPro had expected to return to profita …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: GoPro裁员23%
zh.summary: GoPro宣布计划裁员145人——占其631人员工队伍的23%——由于这家运动摄像机公司面临竞争和收入下滑。裁员将在2026年第二季度进行，可能给公司造成高达1500万美元的遣散费和福利成本。

title: Thousands of consumer routers hacked by Russia's military
summary: Russian military-linked actors have compromised consumer routers in over 120 countries, primarily targeting end-of-life devices in homes and small offices. The widespread attack underscores critical vulnerabilities in aging networking hardware worldwide.
content: End-of-life routers in homes and small offices hacked in 120 countries.

zh.title: 数千台消费级路由器被俄罗斯军方黑客攻击
zh.summary: 与俄罗斯军方关联的行为体已在120多个国家破坏了消费级路由器，主要针对家庭和小型办公室中的报废设备。这次广泛的攻击强调了全球老化网络硬件中的关键漏洞。

title: Continuous glucose monitoring made me continuously crazy
summary: The author examines the experience of using over-the-counter continuous glucose monitors like Dexcom Stelo and Abbott Lingo for non-medical biohacking purposes, exploring how constant glucose tracking affects daily decisions and mental health. The piece questions whether CGM adoption by non-diabetics provides genuine benefit.
content:
Continuous glucose monitors — also referred to as glucose biosensors — aren’t just for diabetics anymore.	

Daily life is different when you're tracking glucose. A little over a year ago, I was on my way to a conference. My bags were packed, the Uber was on its way, but there was one last thing to do before I could head to the airport. Tearing open a small isopropyl alcohol wipe, I cleaned the skin on the back of my arm. After that, I applied a small applicator to the clean skin, doing my best to ignore the visible needle inside. I squeezed my eyes shut and pressed a button. It made a ka-thunk. I repeated the process on the other arm. 
In my right arm, I now had a Dexcom Stelo. In the left, an Abbott Lingo. Both were over-the-counter continuous g …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 连续血糖监测让我持续崩溃
zh.summary: 作者探讨了使用Dexcom Stelo和Abbott Lingo等非处方连续血糖监测仪进行非医学生物优化的体验，研究了持续的血糖追踪如何影响日常决定和心理健康。该文质疑非糖尿病患者采用CGM是否能提供真正的益处。

title: Why Microsoft’s war on Windows’ Control Panel is taking so long
summary: Microsoft's decade-long effort to migrate Windows' Control Panel to the modern Settings app remains incomplete due to compatibility concerns with diverse network and printer devices. The company is proceeding cautiously to avoid breaking existing hardware integrations.
content:
The Control Panel still exists in Windows 11. | Screenshot by Tom Warren / The Verge	

Microsoft first started trying to get rid of the Control Panel in 2012, with the launch of Windows 8. More than a decade later, it's still working on migrating all the old Control Panel items into the modern Settings app in Windows 11. While there have been hints that the Control Panel might finally go away, the reality is a lot more complicated for Microsoft.
"We're doing it carefully because there are a lot of different network and printer devices & drivers we need to make sure we don't break in the process," explains March Rogers, partner director of design at Microsoft. I could be wrong, but I think this is the first full explanation we …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 为什么微软对Windows控制面板的战争耗时如此之长
zh.summary: 微软历时十年将Windows控制面板迁移到现代设置应用的努力仍未完成，原因是对各种网络和打印机设备的兼容性考虑。该公司正在谨慎地进行，以避免破坏现有的硬件集成。

title: Google quietly launched an AI dictation app that works offline
summary: Google launched an offline-first dictation app using Gemma AI models to compete with apps like Whisper Flow. The app's offline capability addresses privacy and reliability concerns for voice input.
content: Google's new offline-first dictation app uses Gemma AI models to take on the apps like Wispr Flow.

zh.title: 谷歌悄悄推出了一款离线工作的AI听写应用
zh.summary: 谷歌推出了一款基于Gemma AI模型的离线优先听写应用，与Whisper Flow等应用竞争。该应用的离线功能解决了语音输入的隐私和可靠性问题。
